summary: Restore the full 21-point hand model, reject face false positives, and move gesture feedback to a full-screen transparent HUD.
scope: Align the mirrored camera preview and Vision skeleton coordinates.
Use all 21 Apple Vision hand joints and reject sparse or implausibly small point clouds.
Use median joint confidence so valid hands reach the gesture engine.
Show a click-through full-screen skeleton, pinch line, and dynamic hand-state label.
Add a direct system page-down diagnostic action.
validation: release app build, ad-hoc signature verification, and installation as version 0.2.0
notes: Camera calibration preview is off by default; full-screen gesture HUD is on by default.
Real-hand direction and cross-application scrolling still require user validation.
